common.tagline: Water done right, powered by intelligence.
common.name: Name

landing.heroSubtitle: Three roots, one promise: water done right, powered by AI. AQWELIA is the intelligent copilot that watches over your pool 24/7 — prudent diagnosis, exact action plan, always crystal-clear water.
landing.problemTitle: Pool maintenance is a nightmare for most owners.
landing.problemGreenWaterText: You wake up, the water is green. Panic. What to do? In what order?
landing.problemStormText: Chlorine has dissolved, pH has shifted. Risky to swim?
landing.problemEyesText: “Too much chlorine,” you think. Wrong: it's chloramines.
landing.problemOverdoseText: You pour by guesswork. 30% of products go down the drain.
landing.problemVacationText: 2 weeks unsupervised = 1 week of heavy treatment.
landing.problemQuote: “We spend more time Googling than enjoying the pool.”
landing.costsTitle: How much does your pool REALLY cost each year?
landing.costsSubtitle: People massively underestimate the real cost. Here are French and European averages (sources: FPP, Aquaguard, 2023-2024 market studies).
landing.costsRow2Note: Often ON TOP of the pro
landing.costsCalloutText: green water (€80 of products + 2 days), electrolyzer breakdown (€150 pro call-out), leak (€300-2000).
landing.piscinisteTitle: The pool pro is useful. But doesn't solve everything.
landing.piscinisteNotIncludedTitle: What the pool pro does NOT do
landing.piscinisteNotIncluded1: Be there on Sunday when the water turns
landing.piscinisteNotIncluded2: Watch between visits (storm Tuesday, visit Friday)
landing.piscinisteNotIncluded3: Tell you “RIGHT NOW, can I swim?”
landing.piscinisteNotIncluded6: Teach you to understand your pool
landing.piscinisteCallout1: With a pool pro, you're on your own
landing.solutionStep1Text: Take a photo of the water / filter / test strip, enter your values (or scan).
landing.solutionStep2Text: AI + deterministic engine analyze: pool profile, weather, history.
landing.solutionStep3Text: 1. TA+ 2040g → 2. pH- 900ml → 3. Shock chlorine → filtration 4h → re-test 3h → no swimming 8h.
landing.solutionDeterministText1: We don't trust your safety to an LLM. Calculations are exact, testable, prudent.
landing.comparatorFeature2: AI photo diagnostic (water, filter, electrolyzer, cell)
landing.comparatorConclusion1: No app combines a deterministic engine + multimodal VLM + real-time weather + contextual reminders.
landing.simulationsTitle: What AQWELIA changes, scene by scene.
landing.simulationsS1Without: Panic. Pool pro unreachable. Random purchase of algaecide + flocculant (€40). Water still cloudy Monday. Swimming cancelled.
landing.simulationsS1With: Photo → AI detects algae + likely high pH. Plan: pH- (€4.5) → measured shock chlorine → brush → filter 24h. Cost: €12. Clear water Monday.
landing.simulationsS2Without: No idea. Storm passes. Water unbalanced for 2 days. Risky swimming.
landing.simulationsS2With: Weather alert “Storm 70% tonight → check chlorine before 8pm”. Proactive action. Stable water.
landing.simulationsS3Without: Green or even black water. Pool out of service for 1 week. €80 of products + 2 days of work.
landing.simulationsS3With: Before leaving → “Vacation mode” guide (shock, full dispenser, scheduled filtration, cover). Return: clear water, 15-min check.
landing.simulationsS4Without: “Too much chlorine” → cut chlorine → green water 3 days later.
landing.simulationsS4With: AQWELIA explains “chloramines” (combined chlorine). Recommends a shock to break them. Right diagnosis, right action.
landing.simulationsS5Without: Water turns. Algae. Chlorine overuse. Family conflict.
landing.simulationsS5With: Alert “Heatwave → +2h filtration + daily chlorine test”. Prevention. Stable water.
landing.simulationsS6Without: Wait for the pool pro's visit. Cloudy water meanwhile.
landing.simulationsS6With: Photo of the gauge → “High pressure, backwash recommended” + step-by-step guide. Immediate, free action.
landing.simulationsNote: Based on real cases experienced by the founders.
landing.savingsRoi3: And you get 25h of free time back.
landing.storyTitle: Built by pool owners, for pool owners.
landing.storyQuote1: “Three roots, one promise: water done right, powered by AI.”
landing.storyQuote2: “After 15 years, 3 different pools (concrete, shell, above-ground), 2 electrolyzers, a sand filter and a cartridge filter, hundreds of tests, dozens of bad surprises — we'd had enough.”
landing.storyQuote3: “We tried everything: the expensive pool pro who comes once a week, basic apps that say ‘add chlorine’, forums, YouTube videos at 11pm.”
landing.storyQuote4a: “Nothing answered the only question that matters:
landing.storyQuote4b: “RIGHT NOW, with MY readings, MY pool, MY weather, what do I do, in what order, and when can I swim?”
landing.storyQuote5: “AQWELIA was born from that frustration. Not by a team of marketers. By avid users sick of green water.”
landing.variationsTitle: Why does water change all the time?
landing.variationsFactor1Text: Storms (dilute chlorine, shift pH), heatwaves (algae), wind (debris), frost (equipment).
landing.variationsFactor2Text: More swimmers = more organic matter = chlorine consumed faster.
landing.variationsFactor3Text: Phosphates and oily residue → cloudy water, algae.
landing.variationsFactor5Text: Chlorine evaporates faster when hot, chemical activity increases.
landing.variationsFactor8Text: Filter loading up, electrolyzer scaling, pump aging.
landing.variationsCallout2: these variations to tailor its advice.
landing.featuresItem1Text: Clear water index, swimming safety, daily actions.
landing.featuresItem2Text: Water, filter, electrolyzer, test strip (prudent VLM).
landing.featuresItem3Text: pH, chlorine, TA, CH, CYA, salt, phosphates + auto plan.
landing.featuresItem4Text: Knows your pool and your history.
landing.internationalSubtitle: 7 languages, 10 countries, standards adapted to your region. AQWELIA adapts to you, wherever you are.
landing.internationalLangDesc: Choose your language, regardless of your country of residence.
landing.internationalCountriesDesc: pH, chlorine, bromine thresholds and units (°C/°F, L/gal) adjust automatically based on your country.
landing.internationalNormsDesc: pH, chlorine, bromine: standards vary by country. AQWELIA adapts automatically (France DGS, USA CDC, Germany DIN 19643, UK PWTAG...)
landing.internationalLanguageDesc: A Mexican in the USA can use the app in Spanish. Language is independent from country of residence.
landing.internationalUnitsDesc: Metric or imperial, °C or °F, m³ or gallons. AQWELIA adapts to your habits, not the other way around.
landing.internationalMarketplaceText: Test strips, chemicals, equipment: AQWELIA recommends the best sellers in your country (Amazon.fr, Leslie's USA, Poolstore UK...).
landing.spaSubtitle: Hot water, small volume, many bathers: a spa is not a pool. Specific treatments (bromine, active oxygen), regular draining, covering and pump programs — AQWELIA handles everything.
landing.spaCard1Text: Bromine or active oxygen — no chlorine that evaporates in hot water. AQWELIA guides you to the right disinfectant based on your spa's temperature.
landing.spaCard2Text: Drain reminders calculated based on your usage. Draining every 3-4 months is often MORE economical than saturating the water with products.
landing.spaCard3Text: Cover after each bath: anti-evaporation, anti-algae, heat retention. AQWELIA reminds you of the right daily habits.
landing.spaCard4Text: Jacuzzi, Sundance, Hot Spring, Bestway, Intex, Wellis, Desjoyaux… or generic Chinese. AQWELIA recognizes your spa and adapts its advice.
landing.spaCard5Text: Number of seats, usage frequency, pump programs, target temperature. AQWELIA calculates drains and filtration cycles based on YOUR reality.
landing.spaPremiumText1: Full Spa support (bromine, active oxygen, smart draining, pump programs) is reserved for the
landing.spaTreatmentsDesc: At high temperature, the choice of disinfectant changes everything.
landing.spaDrainageTitle: Drain rather than over-treat: the economic calculation
landing.spaDrainageText1: After 3-4 months, spa water is saturated with organic matter, minerals and treatment residue. Continuing to add products becomes
landing.spaDrainageText3: than a full drain. AQWELIA alerts you at the right time and calculates the ideal frequency based on your usage.
landing.spaBrandsDesc: AQWELIA recognizes the main global brands and generic Chinese spas.
landing.faqQ1: Does AQWELIA replace the pool professional?
landing.faqA1: No. It complements them. The pool pro visits once a week; AQWELIA covers the other 6 days, handles emergencies, and teaches you to understand your pool. Many users keep a pool pro + AQWELIA.
landing.faqA2: The AI is cautious and always displays a confidence level. Critical dosage calculations are NOT done by the AI but by a deterministic engine. In case of doubt, AQWELIA says "consult a professional".
landing.faqQ3: Can I use AQWELIA without a pool pro?
landing.faqA3: Yes, that's the most common case. The app guides you step by step like a good pool pro would.
landing.faqA4: Yes, 100%. No resale. Your photos and measurements remain yours.
landing.faqA5: The web mode requires a connection. The native mobile app will have an offline mode for tests and logs.
landing.faqA6: Yes! AQWELIA manages spas with dedicated features: bromine or active oxygen treatment, temperature monitoring, drain reminders, anti-evaporation covering, adapted filtration programs. Available from the Lagoon plan.
landing.faqQ7: What if I have multiple pools?
landing.faqA7: The Lagoon plan allows 1 pool + 1 spa, the Atlas plan is unlimited (for pool pros).
landing.faqA8: Yes, no commitment. No hidden fees.
landing.finalCtaTitle: Your pool deserves a real copilot.
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Free to start. No credit card. In 2 minutes you'll know what to do.
landing.finalCtaDisclaimer: Already 11 modules · 20 guides · deterministic dosage engine · real-time weather
landing.disclaimer: AQWELIA assists with diagnosis and maintenance but does not replace a professional. Dosages must follow product instructions. In case of doubt, electrical danger, leak or irritation, contact a professional.
landing.footerTagline: The AI copilot that tells you exactly what to do, how much, in what order, and when to swim. Made in France 🇫🇷.

premiumFeatures: Spa and hot water (bromine, active oxygen)

settings.manageUnavailable: Management unavailable in dev — Stripe not configured

diagnostic.title: Photo diagnostic
diagnostic.subtitle: Photograph the water, a wall, the filter or a test strip. AQWELIA identifies likely problems and suggests next steps.
diagnostic.typeHint: Photo type to guide the AI (you can change)
diagnostic.disclaimer: Probable values, not exact. AI can be wrong — confirm with a water test before any treatment.
diagnostic.resultSubtitle: The AI identifies visible problems and suggests actions.
diagnostic.noDiagnosticDesc: Take a photo of your pool to get an AI diagnosis.
diagnostic.deleteWarning: This action is permanent. The diagnostic and its photo will be deleted from your history.
diagnostic.reopenToastDesc: You can complete the steps below.
diagnostic.verifyNewPhoto: Take a new photo to verify
diagnostic.resolvedDesc: Your pool is now healthy. The control analysis confirms the problem is resolved.
diagnostic.notResolvedDesc: Continue treatment and re-check in a few hours.
diagnostic.littleImprovement: Little improvement. Adjust your approach with the new plan below.
diagnostic.newPlanDesc: Based on the analysis of your new photo, here are the recommended complementary steps:

weather.locationDenied: Location denied. Allow geolocation or type your city manually.

admin.popupDesc: Create popups that appear based on triggers.
admin.popupNoPopups: No popups. Click "+ Add" to create your first promo popup.
admin.contentDesc: Customize app texts without modifying code.

spa.premiumNote: Spa support is available starting from the Lagoon plan.

waterTest.title: Water analysis
waterTest.savedDesc: Your action plan has been updated.

spaData.treatment_oxygen_con3: Less effective in very hot water (>35°C)
spaData.maint_daily_check_desc: Check temperature, water level, and excessive foam. If water is cloudy or smells, test immediately.
spaData.maint_weekly_test_desc: Measure pH (7.0-7.6), bromine (3-5 mg/L) or active oxygen (8 mg/L), and TA (80-120 mg/L). Adjust if needed.
spaData.maint_weekly_filter_desc: Remove the filter cartridge and rinse with a hose. Every 2 months, soak in a spa filter cleaner.
spaData.maint_cover_daily_desc: Always cover the spa after use to: prevent evaporation, prevent algae, retain heat, protect from debris.
spaData.maint_drain_3months_desc: Drain the spa completely every 3-4 months. A drain is often MORE ECONOMICAL than over-treating with chemicals.
spaData.maint_drain_heavy_use_desc: If the spa is used very frequently, drain more often (every 2 months).
spaData.maint_pump_program_desc: Set the pump to filter at least 4h/day. For heavy use, increase to 6h/day.
spaData.maint_shell_clean_desc: At each drain, clean the shell with a suitable product. Check the condition of the surface, jets, and nozzles.
